author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 - Purgation Update | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP4133-PPSA04452_00-SPACEMARINESII00

Today’s Patch 13 comes with a new PvE mission, a major update to Siege Mode, and whole new sets of weapon and armour cosmetics, both free and paid.

Focus Entertainment and Saber Interactive are excited to announce the release of the Purgation Update for Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 at today’s Warhammer Skulls Festival. Available now free for all PlayStation 5 players, this update brings a host of free content and the long-awaited Iron Hands Chapter Pack.

Discover all there is to know in today’s Purgation Update Trailer !

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #warhammer40k #spacemarine2 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Agni: Village of Calamity - Protocol Override Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist Today : https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019121

Wired Productions is proud to announce that we are publishing Agni: Village of Calamity, which is a cinematic survival horror game inspired by the greatest classics of horror media.

Agni, an investigator from a covert Indonesian police unit, defies orders and pushes into a remote village shrouded in warnings. What starts as a rogue investigation soon descends into something far more terrifying.

The Florist is a beautiful survival horror experience coming soon to PS5. In a town overgrown with deadly flowers, players solve ingenious puzzles, defeat horrifying enemies, and uncover the mystery behind a plan to create new life in the most inhuman way imaginable.

text:
Warhammer Survivors - Skulls Trailer | PS5 Games
Find out more: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016825/

Thrust into a universe of relentless war, become the embodiment of bullet hell in Warhammer Survivors, a fast-paced roguelite survivors game. Play as characters from the Warhammer 40,000 and Warhammer: Age of Sigmar universes, collect and upgrade iconic weapons and destroy endless swarms of enemies. Coming 2026 to PlayStation 5.

#ps5 #ps5games #warhammer

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Chaos Gate - Deathwatch - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist Now: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017095

Take direct command of an elite Deathwatch Kill Team in the next chapter of the brutal, turn-based tactical RPG Chaos Gate saga! Lead your Deathwatch Space Marines into battle against the enemies of mankind, supported by devoted agents of the Inquisition and Astra Militarum. Wage eternal war across hostile worlds, drive back deadly Xenos hordes and resist the insidious and corrupting forces of Chaos.

Every decision matters within the grim darkness of the far future.  

#ps5 #ps5games #warhammer40k

text:
Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/warhammer-age-of-sigmar-deathmaster

Play a sneaky & brutal Skaven Assassin in Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster, a new, refreshing but gritty take on the 2D Action platformer genre coming 2027.

Skulk through an engaging 2D Action-platformer, reclaim stealth from the filth and shadows and delve into a grimy, unstable world and story.
Escape, Kill, Ascend and Become a Deathmaster.

text:
Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader -The Infinite Museion Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP6646-PPSA15692_00-INFINITEMUSEION3

The Infinite Museion, the third story expansion for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader, draws you into the iconic vault of Trazyn the Infinite and will be released on June 11, 2026. Pursue rare artefacts, enhance yourself with augmentations, and choose whether to serve the designs of one of the galaxy’s most infamous collectors or oppose him. To be released on PS5 June 11, 2026

#ps5 #ps5games #warhammer40k

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000 : Speed Freeks - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016640

OI! GITZ! The SPEEDWAAAGH is NOW AVAILABLE ON PS5 

Warhammer 40,000: Speed Freeks delivers high-orktane combat racing in the Warhammer 40,000 universe!

Drive a variety of miniature accurate vehicles in explosive, chaotic races -  mastering advanced movement and explosive weaponry online or against bots. Unlock gear, customize your rides with over 400 cosmetic options and paints and use the Creation Workshop to create, share, and play custom maps from the community!

The console launch also features full cross-platform support with Steam and EGS - so you can Race Togetha', Fight Togetha' and Create Togetha' with your boyz no matter what platform they krump on!.

#ps5 #ps5games #warhammer40k #speedfreeks

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
King of Tokyo - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/EP4295-PPSA27029_00-KINGOFTOKYOPS5WW

The iconic board game created by the legendary Richard Garfield makes its console debut!
In King of Tokyo, choose your monster, roll the dice, unleash destructive powers and crush your rivals in chaotic monster showdowns. Play solo against the AI or challenge your friends in intense local matches with up to 6 players. 

King of Tokyo: available now on PlayStation 5
